'''Cinnatar''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Sorrus system/Legends|Sorrus system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was ruled by a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment]]'' {{Mo}}
